user_intent_cn: 5d33 Activity92悬挂+worker JSONL百分钟无输出：自动recovery派下一worker；monitor改已挂；续同workflow禁新owner。

live_evidence_cn.process: codex exec PID 53408 zombie ~66MB low CPU tied to worker.90
live_evidence_cn.monitor_bug: state_cn=在跑 + blocker_cn=无 while jsonl_staleness_cn=100分钟无新输出
live_evidence_cn.user_verdict: workflow alive but mainline stalled; not healthy RUNNING

root_cause_cn: worker turn 已在 JSONL 终态(turn.completed)但 Temporal activity 未 Complete；编排层 pending=Started 与执行层无进展脱节；monitor 把 pending_activity 当在跑，忽略 JSONL staleness+terminal turn。

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: 成熟检测：task-bound worker JSONL 有 turn.completed/raw-final RESULT 且 mtime>staleness_threshold(如15-30min) 同时 Temporal pending codex_worker_turn_activity Started → named_blocker WORKER_ACTIVITY_STALE_ORPHANED

Temporal 成熟 recovery：对悬挂 activity 走 heartbeat timeout / activity failure with explicit reason / complete-with-stale-evidence 之一（按现有 workflow 合同）；然后同 workflow 派下一 bounded codex_worker_turn 或 phase-exit checker；禁止 spawn 新 owner
codex_must_implement.acceptance: Activity 92 不再无限 Started；history 出现 Complete/Fail+下一 Scheduled

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: activator 层：JSONL terminal + process alive + no mtime growth → terminate stale codex exec child；写 task-scoped recovery evidence json
monitor/observation-snapshot：staleness超过阈值且 activity Started → resolved_status_cn=已挂（非在跑）；named_blocker surfaced；next_machine_action=自动recovery派worker；禁止卡点无+不用动
user_visible_forbidden: 在跑+100分钟无输出同时出现

codex_must_implement.summary_cn: recovery 后同 5d33 continue_same_task signal 或 workflow 内 timer 自动派 observation-snapshot / ingress signal 根修 worker；Grok verdict 不挡 L1 续跑

acceptance_machine: monitor?task_id=5d33 state_cn=已挂 or 在修 after detection, not 在跑+无卡点
